title: Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)
content:
{{Top|rwm|new|italics=1}} {{Youmay|an audio drama|the [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight|novel]]}} {{Audiobook |image=[[File:JediKnight_Ca.jpg]] |title=''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' |author=*[[William C. Dietz]]{{HighBridge|url=starwardarfo5.html|text=''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight''}} *[[John Whitman]] {{C|adaption}}[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]] |narrator=[[Ken Hiller]]
{{C|with a full cast}} |producer=[[Tom Voegeli]] |director=[[Peter Moore]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |publisher=[[HighBridge Audio]] |release date=[[1998]] |rereleased= |media type=*Cassette tape *Compact disc {{C|as part of [[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|Collector's Trilogy]]}}''[[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy]]'' |run time=1 hour 34 minutes
(94 minutes)[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]] |discs= |cassettes=2 |pages= |isbn=9781565112766 |timeline=[[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' novella, upon which this audio drama is based, in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars: Dark Forces (novellas)|''Star Wars: Dark Forces'' novellas]] |preceded by=[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Rebel Agent'' audio drama]] |followed by= }} ''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' was an audio dramatization based on [[William C. Dietz]]'s [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight|novel of the same title]] adapted by [[John Whitman]]. The performance was directed by [[Peter Moore]] and featured music from the original movies' [[musical score]] by ''Star Wars'' composer [[John Williams]]. It was released [[November 1]], [[1998]] by [[HighBridge Audio]] as a two cassette tape set. ==Publisher's summary== ''In Jedi Knight, Jerec, the Dark Jedi, brings his forces to Ruusan in the final part of his search for the Valley of the Jedi. Destroying anything that gets in his way, Jerec reaches the Valley just ahead of Kyle Katarn and Jan Ors. With the help of the indigenous inhabitants of the planet, Kyle and Jan confront Jerec's Jedi and prepare for a final showdown with Jerec. If Jerec defeats Kyle, the unlimited power contained in the Valley will enable him to rule the galaxy. Are Kyle's untrained Jedi powers enough to defeat Jerec?'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot-link|Dark Forces: Jedi Knight}} ==Continuity== The audio drama contains multiple discrepancies with the book it is based on, including: *It being stated several times that eight years have passed since the [[Mission to Danuta]]. *The ''[[Crynyd]]'' being referred to as a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]]. ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781565112766}}; 1998; HighBridge Audio; Cassette tape *{{ISBN|9781565112780}}; 1998; HighBridge Audio; Compact disc {{C|as part of Collector's Trilogy}} ==Credits== {{Credits |cast= *'''[[Mark Benninghofen]]''' as '''[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]''' *'''[[Randal Berger]]''' as '''[[Kyle Katarn]]''' *'''[[Christopher Bloch]]''' as '''[[Aagon|Lt. Aagon]]''', '''Bouncer''' *'''[[James Cada]]''' as '''Screamer''', '''Imperial Pilot''' *'''[[Mo Collins]]''' as '''[[Jan Ors]]''' *'''[[Patrick Coyle]]''' as '''Speeder Pilot''', '''Imperial Co-Pilot''' *'''[[Nancy Crocker]]''' as '''[[Sariss]]''' *'''[[Stephen D'Ambrose]]''' as '''[[Boc Aseca|Boc]]''', '''Weapons Officer''' *'''[[Susanne Egli]]''' as '''[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]''' *'''[[Louise Enyeart]]''' as '''[[Lasko]]''', '''[[Marie Peeno|Peeno]]''' *'''[[Chris Forth]]''' as '''[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]''' *'''[[James Gaulke]]''' as '''[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]''' *'''[[Gary Groomes]]''' as '''[[Vig|Major Vig]]''' *'''[[Allen Hamilton]]''' as '''[[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]]''' *'''[[Emil Herrera]]''' as '''[[Alfonso Luiz Obota|Obata]]''' *'''[[Ken Hiller]]''' as '''Narrator''' *'''[[Jay Hornbacher]]''' as '''[[Grif Grawley|Grif]]''' *'''[[Tom Keith]]''' as '''Sergeant''', '''Imperial Pilot''' *'''[[Timothy Kuhlmann]]''' as '''[[Yun]]''' *'''[[Peter Moore]]''' as '''Officer''', '''Floater''' *'''[[Martin Ruben]]''' as '''Battle Droid''', '''[[Maw (Dark Jedi)|Maw]]''' *'''[[Sue Scott]]''' as '''[[Carole Grawley|Carole]]''' *'''[[Michael Tezla]]''' as '''[[Qu Rahn/Legends|Rahn]]''' *'''[[Jack Walsh]]''' as '''[[Byron Devo III|Mayor Devo]]''', '''[[Luther Pardy|Pardy]]''' *'''[[John Wehrman]]''' as '''[[Purdy M.
